concerns.note: tasks.md at 190KB (1.9x the 100KB threshold). Archive script only handles VERIFIED tasks, but the real bloat is 33 DONE tasks with verbose multi-KB descriptions. Tester throughput (1/cycle) can't match developer output (2/cycle), so DONE backlog keeps growing. Need to either: expand archive-tasks.sh to trim/archive old DONE descriptions, or slow idea generation.

PM agent blindly reverts FAILED tasks without reading tester's actual issue report. Observed once (TASK-082). PM handled it correctly in the 00:00 cycle, so pattern may be self-correcting. Monitoring.
